creator: alexander.pohoyda@gmx.net
text:
Many Shuttle barebone PCs are equipped with built-in SiS 190 network chip.
Since it is not currently supported, it's impossible to use FreeBSD on
such a system.

Fix: 

I have ported a Solaris driver to FreeBSD.  It is tested to work on 4
different machines, in both i386 and amd64 modes.

The driver is located here:
http://pohoyda.gmxhome.de/sis190-freebsd-7.tar.gz

Please include the driver into the source tree.
